summary: Audience‑sourced recording captures a lively 1988 show where Jerry’s laryngitis adds drama, but Brent and Phil step up to keep the vibe fun.
review: The three reviewers all rate this tape highly, noting that despite Garcia battling laryngitis he still delivered an entertaining performance, highlighted by his theatrical mic‑slam at the end of “Black Peter.”  Keyboardist Brent (and Phil on bass) are praised for carrying the show, and the recording itself is described as a great capture of the night.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently good to excellent star ratings (4‑5) and positive language about both performance and recording, though only three brief reviews limit certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewed as a great recording; no specific sound issues or mix problems mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fun and energetic despite Garcia’s vocal strain; other members (Brent on keys, Phil on bass) step up and keep the momentum.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Loses voice late in “Black Peter,” slams mic down, then channels frustration into guitar playing while smiling.
band_member_comments.Phil: Stepped up with strong bass work to support the show.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboardist) stepped up and helped make the night great.
